sentences.arabic: الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ رَمْزٌ لِلْكَرَمِ وَالضِّيَافَةِ فِي ثَقَافَتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa je simbol darežljivosti i gostoprimstva u našoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Arab coffee is a symbol of generosity and hospitality in our culture.

sentences.arabic: نُقَدِّمُ الْقَهْوَةَ دَائِمًا مَعَ التَّمْرِ الْحُلْوِ لِلزُّوَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Kafu posjetiocima uvijek služimo uz slatke hurme.
sentences.translationEn: We always serve coffee with sweet dates to the visitors.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ جَدِّي الْجُلُوسَ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ وَشُرْبَ قَهْوَتِهِ بِبُطْءٍ.
sentences.translation: Moj djed voli sjediti u bašti i polako piti svoju kafu.
sentences.translationEn: My grandfather likes to sit in the garden and drink his coffee slowly.
